entry.title: lissy93 commented on an issue in domain-locker
entry.content:
lissy93 commented on lissy93/domain-locker#110 · July 10, 2026 12:12
lissy93 commented Jul 10, 2026
But the TL;DR is - the .li TLD is just a bit weird. They haven't submitted their RDAP to IANA, they don't return complete data, the use non-standar…

entry.title: lissy93 closed an issue in domain-locker
entry.content:
lissy93 closed an issue in lissy93/domain-locker · July 10, 2026 12:12
[Feature Request]: Assign custom WHOIS service for certain domains #110
### Describe the feature One of my domains is in .li It seems general WHOIS queries for the domain return nothing, but searching for it in https://…

entry.title: lissy93 contributed to lissy93/who-dat
entry.content:
lissy93 merged lissy93/who-dat#29 · July 10, 2026 11:56
feat: map dates and resistrar from SWITCH payloads #29

SWITCH's RDAP server emits bare dates and org-only jCards. So this PR attempts to parse and normalize these to normal RFC 3339 dates

+288 -3
